description: baseline: faithful Python port of payroll.js from A1-Localization-RU. 6 functions (ndflOnAnnualBase, ndflMonthly, insuranceUnified, insuranceSmeMonthly, childDeductionMonthly, computeMonthlyPayroll). 18 cases (14 scalar + 4 dict) per-case field set. 2026 tax reform: 5-band НДФЛ (13/15/18/20/22%), unified 30% + МСП 1.5xМРОТ split (15% above). Inlined roundRub + roundToWholeRubles from money.js with JS-Math.round-compatible half-toward-+inf (Python's builtin round is banker's, doesn't match). All 18 pass on first run.
